title: BetterPhantoms
body:
# **Better Phantoms**

## Features
- Removes vanilla spawn mechanic. (Dont sleep for 3 days..)
- Phantoms spawn in the End dimension randomly around the player and up to 8 at a time.
- Phantoms are neutral, they will only attack if the player attacks first.
- Phantoms attack in swarms if made aggressive.
- Supports configuration for spawning, group size, aggression timout.

Feel free to use in any modpacks :)
